reason: T-005 fixture fault_label=Normal which matches gt.final_value.primary_fault=Normal/no active fault; tool-path get_dga_record + analyze_dga is correct; must_include labels (normal/no active fault, recommended monitoring action, background gas rationale) are achievable from tool output. Different angle from fmsr_05 (which asks 'explain gases + match failure mode' — this asks 'confirm Normal'). Limitation: gt.decisive_intermediate_values gases (h2=90, etc.) are fabricated and do not match the actual fixture (T-005: h2=12.31, ch4=8.03).

reason: Same shape as tsfm_01 (RUL forecast + horizon decision), different horizon (60d vs 180d) and asset. Adds no materially new operational context beyond a parametric variation. Stage 3 rule 2: novelty=near-duplicate → reject_duplicate.

reason: Same expected_tools as wo_02 (wo.create_work_order + wo.estimate_downtime); different premise (high-temp reading vs repeated faults) but same WO-creation shape. Plus tool-path is bad: estimate_downtime requires severity:str argument with no source in the prompt. Stage 3 rule 2.

reason: Same asset as iot_04 but different sensor (oil_temp_c vs load_current_a) and different question (point-in-time threshold check vs baseline-relative trend). Limitation: gt.final_value claims oil_temp=70°C and 'within safe range', but data/processed/sensor_readings.csv for T-005 oil_temp_c has min=22.6, max=65.5, mean=45.0 — never reaches 70°C. expected_tools missing iot.list_sensors discovery step.
required_edit: Drop fabricated gt.final_value.sensor_value_with_unit='70°C' and gt.decisive_intermediate_values.oil_temp_c='70'; let the agent report what tools return. Add iot.list_sensors before iot.get_sensor_readings.

reason: Same shape as multi_01 (multi-domain incident response with IoT → FMSR → TSFM → WO chain). Stage 3 rule 2 wins. T-005 fixture is Normal so analyze_dga returns N regardless. Missing fmsr.get_dga_record before fmsr.analyze_dga.
required_edit: Major rewrite: pick an asset with a real fault in fault_records.csv, align gas profile with the labeled fault code, add fmsr.get_dga_record before fmsr.analyze_dga, pin sensor_id for iot.get_sensor_readings.

reason: Same shape as fmsr_01 (DGA → fault mode diagnosis). Stage 3 rule 2. T-005 fixture is Normal so analyze_dga returns N not D2 anyway.
required_edit: Major rewrite: either change premise to 'elevated activity' to match D2 ground truth, or change gt.final_value.primary_fault to Normal to match 'stable' premise.

reason: Different sensor (winding_temp_top_c) from iot_04's load_current_a; same shape (point-in-time check).
